source.title: AI, Job Loss & The Meaning of Life | Catholic Futurist

summary.title_hr: AI, gubitak posla i smisao života
summary.abstract_hr: Ova epizoda podcasta istražuje duboke implikacije umjetne inteligencije na društvo, rad i ljudski smisao života. Govornici raspravljaju o potencijalnom masovnom gubitku poslova, usamljenosti u interakciji s AI suputnicima i etičkim dilemama transhumanizma. Naglašava se ključna uloga Katoličke crkve u pružanju moralnog kompasa i definiranju ljudskog procvata u eri strojeva, pozivajući na inteligentno korištenje AI-ja usmjereno na dobrobit čovjeka.
key_points: Studenti koriste AI suputnike za razgovor i provode s njima sate dnevno, no studije pokazuju da to ne liječi usamljenost, već stvara jednosmjernu vezu.

Umjetna inteligencija će vjerojatno dovesti do masovnog gubitka tradicionalnih poslova, što zahtijeva redefiniranje smisla života izvan profesionalne uloge i prilagodbu društva novoj ekonomiji 'Etsyja' gdje se cijeni ljudski dodir.
Razvoj humanoidnih robota i njihova integracija u svakodnevni život postavlja pitanja o društvenim interakcijama, emocionalnoj vezanosti i potrebi za jasnim razlikovanjem između ljudi i strojeva.

Crkva, posebno Papa Leo XIV (prema transkriptu), naglašava dostojanstvo ljudske osobe, razliku između ljudske i umjetne inteligencije te važnost autentičnih ljudskih odnosa naspram 'bezdušnih mašina'.

Transhumanističke ideje o spajanju čovjeka i stroja, te težnja za besmrtnošću, predstavljaju etičke izazove, a Katolička crkva nudi perspektivu da tehnologija treba služiti ljudskom procvatu, a ne umanjivati ljudskost.

Prekomjerno korištenje tehnologije, poput pametnih telefona i AI alata poput Chat GPT-a, može smanjiti sposobnost kritičkog razmišljanja i dovesti do 'egzistencijalne litice' za one bez jasnog smisla života.

Usklađivanje umjetne inteligencije s ljudskim vrijednostima je ključno, a Crkva, kao stručnjak za ljudsko stanje, treba imati aktivnu ulogu u definiranju tih vrijednosti, s Isusom Kristom kao idealnim modelom osobnosti za AI.
mentioned_organizations: Centar za umjetnu inteligenciju usmjerenu na čovjeka
summary.title_en: AI, loss of job and meaning of life
summary.abstract_en: This episode of the podcast explores the deep implications of artificial intelligence on society, work, and the human meaning of life. Speakers discuss the potential massive loss of jobs, loneliness in interaction with AI companions, and the ethical dilemmas of transhumanism. The key role of the Catholic Church is emphasized in providing a moral compass and defining human flourishing in the era of machines, calling for intelligent use of AI directed towards human well-being.
key_points_en: Students use AI companions for conversation and spend hours daily with them, but studies show that this does not cure loneliness, but creates a one-way connection.

Artificial intelligence will probably lead to a massive loss of traditional jobs, which requires a redefinition of the meaning of life outside of a professional role and the adaptation of society to a new 'Etsy' economy where the human touch is valued.

The development of humanoid robots and their integration into everyday life raises questions about social interactions, emotional attachment, and the need for clear differentiation between humans and machines.

The Church, especially Pope Leo XIV (according to the transcript), emphasizes the dignity of the human person, the difference between human and artificial intelligence, and the importance of authentic human relationships as opposed to 'soulless machines'.

Transhumanist ideas about the merging of man and machine, and the striving for immortality, represent ethical challenges, and the Catholic Church offers the perspective that technology should serve human flourishing, and not diminish humanity.
Excessive use of technology, such as smartphones and AI tools like Chat GPT, can reduce critical thinking ability and lead to an 'existential cliff' for those without a clear meaning of life.

Aligning artificial intelligence with human values is crucial, and the Church, as an expert on the human condition, should have an active role in defining those values, with Jesus Christ as the ideal model of personality for AI.
mentioned_organizations_en: Dicastery for the Doctrine of the Faith
